nasb.text: You rely on your sword, you commit abominations and each of you defiles his neighbor’s wife. Should you then possess the land?” ’

esv.text: You rely on the sword, you commit abominations, and each of you defiles his neighbor’s wife; shall you then possess the land?

cnv.text: 你們倚仗自己的刀劍，行可憎惡的事，人人玷污鄰舍的妻子，你們還可以得這地為業嗎？’

ccb.text: 你们靠刀剑行可憎之事，个个玷污别人的妻子，你们怎能拥有这片土地呢？’
